problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electromagnetic. Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
